response.justification: Bogdan is a capable, long-tenured software engineer with a strong TypeScript/Node.js foundation and recent exposure to MCP tooling and agentic workflows at re:cinq, which is directly relevant. However, the role demands 8+ years of production-grade AI solution delivery, and his AI-specific work is limited to roughly 13 months at his current position. There is no mention of Python, RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or enterprise customer-facing technical leadership — all of which are core requirements or primary responsibilities for this Staff-level role.
strengths: Hands-on experience building MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq, directly aligning with a listed key technology
Demonstrated staff-level engineering career spanning 15+ years across diverse stacks, cloud (AWS CDK), and high-throughput data systems at Dunnhumby
Strong mentorship and knowledge-sharing track record through workshops, open-source projects, and community talks
concerns: AI/GenAI experience is almost entirely limited to the current role (~13 months); falls far short of the 8+ year minimum for production AI solution delivery
Python is absent from the skills section and resume narrative — a primary required language for this role with no evidence of proficiency
No demonstrated experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation/observability pipelines, or enterprise technical discovery sessions with stakeholders
